message.content:
@startuml
actor Administrator as Admin
interface SpecifyNewVaccineUI as SpecifyNewVaccineUI
interface SpecifyNewVaccineController as SpecifyNewVaccineController
interface VaccineTypeStore as VaccineTypeStore
interface VaccineType as VaccineType

participant Company as Company

participant VaccineStore as VaccineStore

participant admPro_AdministrationProcess as admPro_AdministrationProcess

participant vc_Vaccine as vc_Vaccine

participant VaccineTypeList as VaccineTypeList

participant VaccineTypeCode as VaccineTypeCode

note right of SpecifyNewVaccineUI
1 starts specifying a new vaccine and its administration process
2 create(Vaccine)
3 typeList = getVaccineTypeList()
4 getVaccineTypeList()
6 request data (name, manufacturer, type, age groups,doses, elapsing interval, dosage) and show vaccineType list
7 types requested data
8 createVaccineId,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess
9 createVaccineId,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess
10 createVaccineId,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess
11 vc = createVaccineId,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess
12 administrationProcess(minAge,maxAge,numberOfDoses,dosage,timeElapsed)
13 validate(vaccine)
14 saveVaccine()
15 shows data and request confirmation
16 confirms data
17 saveVaccine()
18 saveVaccine()
19 saveVaccine()
20 adVaccine()
21 informs operation (intsuccess)
@endnote

Admin ..>> SpecifyNewVaccineUI : 1 starts specifying a new vaccine and its administration process

SpecifyNewVaccineUI ..>> SpecifyNewVaccineController : 2 create(Vaccine)

SpecifyNewVaccineController ..>> VaccineStore : 3 typeList = getVaccineTypeList()

VaccineStore ..>> Company : 4 getVaccineTypeList()

Company ..>> VaccineStore : 5 VaccineTypeList

VaccineStore ..>> VaccineTypeCode : loop (for all vaccine types)
VaccineTypeCode ..>> VaccineStore : 5 VaccineType(code name)

VaccineStore ..>> admPro_AdministrationProcess : 11 vc = createVaccineId,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess

VaccineStore ..>> vc_Vaccine : 12 administrationProcess(minAge,maxAge,numberOfDoses,dosage,timeElapsed)

vc_Vaccine ..>> admPro_AdministrationProcess : 13 validate(vaccine)

vc_Vaccine ..>> VaccineStore : 14 saveVaccine()

VaccineStore ..>> Company : 15 shows data and request confirmation

Company ..>> SpecifyNewVaccineUI : 16 confirms data

SpecifyNewVaccineUI ..>> Administrator : 17 saveVaccine()

Administrator ..>> SpecifyNewVaccineUI : 18 saveVaccine()

Administrator ..>> SpecifyNewVaccineUI : 19 saveVaccine()

Administrator ..>> SpecifyNewVaccineUI : 20 adVaccine()

Administrator ..>> SpecifyNewVaccineUI : 21 informs operation (intsuccess)

@enduml
